name: Home-Style Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine the eggs with the milk, vanilla, cinnamon, salt, bread cubes, brown sugar, and raisins or dates.
2. Pour the mixture into a 1 1/2-quart baking dish.
3. Place a metal trivet or rack in the bottom of the crockpot.
4. Add 1/2 cup hot water to the crockpot.
5. Set the baking dish on the trivet inside the crockpot.
6. Cover and cook on high for about 2 hours.
7. Serve the pudding warm or cool.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
